title: Profitable Turnkey Lawn Spraying Business.
description:
PROFITABLE TURNKEY LAWN SPRAYING BUSINESS - MOORE, NORMAN, SOUTH OKC, TUTTLE, NEWCASTLE AREAS

Established in 2012, this highly organized lawn spraying business offers an exceptional opportunity for immediate cash flow and long-term growth in Cleveland County's thriving market. Operating as a home-based business, this turnkey operation generates $250,000 in annual revenue with strong $150,000 in seller's discretionary earnings, representing a healthy 60% profit margin.

BUSINESS STRENGTHS:
• 12+ years of continuous operation with proven track record
• Loyal, established customer base built over more than a decade
• Extremely organized operations with efficient route management
• Well-established routes already optimized for maximum efficiency
• Strong local reputation in the Norman/Moore market area Voted top spraying company in Norman 2025
• Home-based operation minimizing overhead costs
• Immediate cash flow opportunity for new owner

FINANCIAL HIGHLIGHTS:
• Annual Revenue: $250,000
• Cash Flow (SDE): $150,000
• Furniture, Fixtures & Equipment: $140,000
• Asking Price: $550,000
• Seller financing available to qualified buyers

GROWTH POTENTIAL:
Positioned in a prime market with significant expansion opportunities. With strategic marketing and dedicated effort, this business has the potential to double revenue within 3-5 years. The established customer base and operational systems provide a solid foundation for growth.

The current owner is retiring after building this successful operation over 12 years. This presents a rare opportunity to acquire a profitable, well-organized business with immediate income potential and substantial room for expansion.

Ideal for an entrepreneur seeking a proven business model in the landscaping services industry with strong local market presence and growth potential in Oklahoma's Cleveland County market.

Ad#:2494683
